title: MCA Jobs 2026 – Project Manager, Field Engineer and More
org: Project Director, Project Manager, Network Specialist, Network Admin, Network Engineer, Security Specialist, Security Admin, Server Admin, Central Helpdesk, Electrical Technician, Field Engineer, Nodal Officer (20 posts total)
applyMode: Offline only (by Post/Courier to RailTel Territory Office, Bengaluru)
shortInfo: RailTel Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 53 Project Manager, Field Engineer and More vacancies across Karnataka. Candidates with B.Sc, B.Tech/B.E, Diploma, M.Sc, MCA Can Apply Offline. The Offline application opens on 20-05-2026, and closes on 30-05-2026. The candidate shall apply Offline through RailTel website, railtel.in.

basic_details.job_title: RailTel Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 53 Project Manager, Field Engineer and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Project Director, Project Manager, Network Specialist, Network Admin, Network Engineer, Security Specialist, Security Admin, Server Admin, Central Helpdesk, Electrical Technician, Field Engineer, Nodal Officer (20 posts total)
basic_details.application_mode: Offline only (by Post/Courier to RailTel Territory Office, Bengaluru)
basic_details.short_information: RailTel Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 53 Project Manager, Field Engineer and More vacancies across Karnataka. Candidates with B.Sc, B.Tech/B.E, Diploma, M.Sc, MCA Can Apply Offline. The Offline application opens on 20-05-2026, and closes on 30-05-2026. The candidate shall apply Offline through RailTel website, railtel.in.

application_fee.details: The notification does not mention any application fee. Candidates should refer to the official notification PDF on the RailTel website for any updates on this aspect before applying.

age_limit.details: Candidates must be a minimum of 21 years and maximum of 50 years as on the last date of submission of application (30-05-2026). Maximum age after all relaxations is 55 years. Relaxation in upper age limit is applicable as per Government of India guidelines for OBC/SC/ST/PwBD candidates.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions regarding educational/professional qualifications, length of experience, and certifications as specified in Annexure-I of the notification for each respective post. Only Indian citizens are eligible to apply.

salary_details.salary: Rs. 3,68,400/- to Rs. 17,32,810/- per annum (varies by post; inclusive of Gratuity and Medical benefits; actual CTC may vary based on experience/certifications)

how_to_apply: Certificates and mark sheets in support of required educational/professional qualifications

Experience certificate from current/previous employers indicating length of experience; if current employer's certificate is unavailable, appointment letter along with first and latest pay slips may be submitted
Caste certificate in prescribed format for OBC-NCL, EWS, SC, and ST candidates
Copy of CV with complete employment history, duly signed with photograph
Photo ID proof and address proof – Passport / Aadhaar Card / Driving License / PAN Card / Voter ID Card (issued by Central/State Govt.)
No Objection Certificate (NOC) if currently working in any Govt./PSU or public body substantially funded by the Govt.
important_instructions: THIS IS NOT A PERMANENT EMPLOYMENT. Engagement is purely on a contractual basis for 05 years. RailTel has no obligation to offer regular employment after the contract period, nor shall the contractual employee claim any right to permanent absorption.

Selected candidates must execute a Service Agreement at the time of joining for a period of one year. Failure to complete the said one-year period will attract a penalty equivalent to three months' gross salary in addition to the applicable notice period.
A mandatory notice period of three months is required prior to resignation. Serving notice does not absolve the candidate from financial obligations under the Service Agreement.
The contract may be terminated earlier due to non-availability of work, unsatisfactory performance, or administrative reasons at the discretion of the Competent Authority.

The contractual engagement shall remain provisional subject to correctness and authenticity of all documents submitted, including caste certificates, experience certificates, and character/antecedent records. Any suppression of facts or false information at any stage will result in immediate termination without notice.
No travelling expenses (TA/DA) will be paid to candidates for appearing in screening, interview, or medical examination.

All corrigendum, interview schedules, results, and panel information will be published only on the official RailTel website (www.railtelindia.com). No information will be published in any other media. Candidates must regularly visit the website and check their registered email.
RTI applications seeking recruitment-related information will not be entertained until the completion of the entire recruitment process.
Canvassing in any form will result in immediate disqualification of the candidate.
In case of any legal dispute, the jurisdiction shall be Hyderabad.
RailTel reserves the right to alter, modify, or cancel any condition in this vacancy notice or the entire process at any stage without prior notice.

WARNING: Beware of touts and job racketeers. RailTel has not authorized any person or agency to act on its behalf for this recruitment. Rely only on the official website www.railtelindia.com and beware of fake websites and social media posts.

click_here.text: Download RailTel KSWAN Project Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for RailTel KSWAN Project Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of offline applications by post/courier is 30 May 2026 during office hours. Applications must reach the RailTel Territory Office in Bengaluru on or before this date.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available in RailTel KSWAN Project Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 53 vacancies have been announced across 20 technical posts including Project Director, Project Manager, Network Specialist, Network Admin, Network Engineer, Security Specialist, Server Admin, Central Helpdesk, Field Engineer, Electrical Technician, and Nodal Officer positions.

faq.question: What is the salary range for RailTel KSWAN Project posts?
faq.answer: The Annual CTC ranges from Rs. 3,68,400/- (Central Helpdesk L1) to Rs. 17,32,810/- (Project Director) per annum, inclusive of Gratuity and Medical benefits. The actual CTC may vary based on experience and certifications.

faq.question: What is the age limit for RailTel KSWAN Project Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be between 21 to 50 years as on 30-05-2026. Age relaxation is available: 3 years for OBC (up to 53 years), 5 years for SC/ST (up to 55 years), and 10 years for PwBD candidates (maximum 55 years after all relaxations).

faq.question: Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, this is purely a contractual engagement for 05 (five) years from the date of joining. There is no guarantee of absorption into RailTel's permanent workforce after the contract period ends.

faq.question: What is the selection process for RailTel KSWAN Project Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is based on Interview followed by Document Verification and Medical Examination. There is no written examination. Candidates must be declared medically fit by RailTel's designated medical authority.

faq.question: Can freshers apply for RailTel KSWAN Project Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, freshers cannot apply. All posts require minimum post-qualification work experience ranging from 3 years (Central Helpdesk) to 15 years (Project Director, Network Specialist, Security Specialist). Internship and training experience is not counted.

faq.question: How to apply for RailTel KSWAN Project Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline only by post/courier to Territory Manager/SBC, RailTel Corporation of India Limited, Territory Office, No. 6/1, 12th Main, Vasanthnagar, Opp. Mount Carmel College Gate-1 Road, Bengaluru – 560052. The envelope must be superscribed: "APPLICATION FOR TECHNICAL FOR KSWAN PROJECT OF RAILTEL IN SOUTHERN REGION ON CONTRACT BASIS."

faq.question: Is NOC required if currently working in a government organization?
faq.answer: Yes, if you are currently working in any Government/PSU/public body substantially funded by the Government, a valid No Objection Certificate (NOC) from your current employer is mandatory and must be submitted with your application.

faq.question: What documents are required with the application?
faq.answer: Required documents include: Matriculation certificate (age proof), educational qualification certificates and mark sheets, experience certificates from employers (or appointment letter with first and latest pay slips), caste/EWS/PwBD certificate if applicable, updated CV with signed photograph, valid Photo ID proof (Aadhaar/PAN/Passport/Driving License/Voter ID), and NOC if currently employed in government sector. All documents must be self-attested and signed on each page.

seo_tags: RailTel Corporation of India Limited Project Manager
